calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, DEC-12-2012: DAVID BENDA APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON BEHALF OF BAVARIAN CYCLE WORKS, INC.; THOMAS MOORE ALSO PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HIS OWN BEHALF THIS DAY.

THE COURT ENTERTAINS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, AND ALSO RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRODUCED AND PRESENTED TO THE COURT.

AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL STATEMENTS PRESENTED AND AFER READING AND REVIEWING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID PORTER; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Judgment Entered
